name: Chipolte Peppper Stuffed Flank Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a skillet. Add chopped onion and sauté until translucent.
2. Add chopped sun-dried tomatoes, chili peppers, and thyme. Sauté for a few minutes more.
3. Mix the grated fontina cheese and bread crumbs with the sautéed mixture.
4. Lay the flank steak flat. Place the stuffing in a line down the long axis of the steak.
5. Roll the steak around the stuffing (it should resemble a large sausage). Tie every two inches with butcher's twine.
6. Heat olive oil in a frying pan. Brown the rolled steak for a few minutes on each side.
7. Transfer the steak to an oven-safe dish and bake at 450°F for 25 minutes.
8. Scrape any residue from the baking dish into the frying pan. Deglaze with white wine.
9. Slice the rolled steak into two-inch medallions and top with the strained wine sauce.
